title: Natural Creams for Hematuria: 8 Best Options

remedy_constituents.constituent_desc: Quercetin is good for hematuria because it has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce blood clotting in the urine and heal damaged tissues in the urinary tract.
Tannins are good for hematuria because they have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce blood loss and swelling in the urinary tract, thereby alleviating symptoms of the condition.

Polyphenols are good for hematuria because they have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce blood in the urine by preventing damage to the blood vessels and tissues in the kidneys and urinary tract.

remedies.remedy_desc: Hematuria is a condition where blood appears in the urine. Urtica dioica cream is a treatment option that can help. The cream is made from the leaves of the stinging nettle plant, which has been used for centuries to treat various health issues. It is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. These compounds can help reduce swelling and irritation in the urinary tract, which can cause bleeding. Urtica dioica cream can also help to improve the overall health of the urinary tract by reducing inflammation and promoting healing. When applied topically to the affected area, the cream can help to reduce the frequency and severity of bleeding episodes. This can be especially helpful for people who experience recurring hematuria.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal cream that helps with hematuria, also known as blood in the urine, start by gathering dried Plantago major leaves and roots. You can purchase these from a health food store or online. Next, combine 2 tablespoons of dried Plantago major leaves and roots with 2 cups of boiling water in a saucepan. Let it steep for 5-7 minutes, then strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl. Allow the mixture to cool. Once it has cooled, mix in 1 tablespoon of beeswax, 1 tablespoon of coconut oil, and 1 tablespoon of shea butter in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and well combined. Remove from heat and slowly pour the herbal liquid into the wax mixture, stirring constantly until it reaches a consistency suitable for a cream. Pour the cream into a clean glass jar and let it cool completely before applying it to the affected area 2-3 times a day. Note: Before using any herbal remedy, consult with a healthcare professional to ensure it is safe for your specific condition.
remedies.image_alt: Urtica dioica herbal creams for hematuria

remedies.remedy_desc: Calendula officinalis cream is a helpful treatment for people with hematuria, which is blood in the urine. This condition can be painful and worrying. The cream is made from the flowers of the calendula plant, which is known for its healing properties. When applied to the affected area, the cream helps to reduce swelling and inflammation. It also soothes and calms the skin, making it less red and irritated. Additionally, calendula cream has antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections that can worsen hematuria. By reducing swelling and preventing infections, calendula cream can help to reduce discomfort and promote healing in people with hematuria. The cream is also easy to apply and can be used as often as needed.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal cream that can help with hematuria, start by gathering dried Plantago major leaves, which are rich in astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. First, infuse 1 tablespoon of dried Plantago major leaves in 2 cups of boiling water for 5-7 minutes to create a tea. Let it steep, then strain the tea and discard the leaves. Next, mix 1/2 cup of the cooled tea with 1/4 cup of a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil to create a potent infusion. Allow this mixture to sit in a cool dark place for 2-3 days, allowing the Plantago major properties to infuse into the oil. After the infusion period, strain the oil through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean bowl. Then, mix the infused oil with 1/4 cup of beeswax and 1/4 cup of a natural emulsifier like shea butter or cocoa butter. Heat this mixture gently over low heat, stirring constantly, until the beeswax and emulsifier have melted and combined with the infused oil. Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool until it reaches a thick, creamy consistency. Once set, your Plantago major herbal cream is ready to use. Apply it gently to the affected area 2-3 times a day to help soothe and calm the bladder and reduce hematuria symptoms.
remedies.image_alt: Calendula officinalis herbal creams for hematuria

remedies.remedy_desc: Aloe barbadensis cream is good for people with hematuria because it helps to soothe and calm the lining of the urinary tract. Hematuria is when there is blood in the urine, and it can be painful and uncomfortable. The cream works by reducing inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can help to stop the bleeding. Aloe barbadensis has anti-inflammatory properties, which means it can help to calm down the body's response to injury or irritation. This can help to ease the symptoms of hematuria, such as burning or stinging when urinating. Additionally, aloe barbadensis cream can help to protect the lining of the urinary tract, making it less likely to get irritated or damaged in the future. This can help to prevent further episodes of hematuria.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal cream that helps with hematuria, you will need dried Plantago major leaves, a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil, beeswax, and a preservative. First, dry the Plantago major leaves by placing them in a low-temperature oven for 2-3 hours or by air-drying them for several weeks. Next, infuse the dried leaves in a carrier oil by placing them in a jar and leaving it in a warm place for 2-3 weeks. Strain the oil and discard the leaves. Then, melt the beeswax in a double boiler or in a microwave-safe bowl in short increments, stirring between each heating. Once the beeswax is melted, add the infused oil and a preservative, and mix well. Pour the mixture into a container and let it cool and harden. Once set, your Plantago major herbal cream is ready to use. Apply it to the affected area 2-3 times a day to help reduce inflammation and promote healing of the bladder or urinary tract.

remedies.remedy_desc: Plantago lanceolata cream is sometimes used to help with hematuria, which is blood in the urine. This is because the cream is made from the plant Plantago lanceolata, also known as ribwort or buckthorn. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for many years to treat various health issues. The cream may help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can cause bleeding. Some people believe that the cream's anti-inflammatory properties can help to soothe and heal the lining of the urinary tract, reducing the amount of blood in the urine. Additionally, the cream may contain other compounds that have a protective effect on the urinary tract, helping to prevent further damage and bleeding.  It's worth noting that more research is needed to fully understand the effects of Plantago lanceolata cream on hematuria. However, some studies suggest that it may be a useful natural remedy for this condition. As with any treatment, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Plantago lanceolata cream to treat hematuria.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal creams that help with hematuria, you'll need a few ingredients and some basic equipment. First, harvest the leaves and stems of Plantago major, also known as common plantain, from a trusted source, making sure to identify the plant correctly. Next, dry the plant material thoroughly using a dehydrator or by air-drying it for several days. Once dry, you can make a herbal infusion by steeping 2-3 tablespoons of the dried plant material in a cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes. After straining the infusion, combine it with a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil in a 1:3 ratio, so 1 part infusion to 3 parts oil. You can then add this mixture to a base cream, such as a simple beeswax and coconut oil mixture, and heat it gently until the ingredients are fully incorporated. Once cooled, you can apply the cream directly to the affected area to help soothe and calm the symptoms of hematuria. It's essential to note that while Plantago major has been traditionally used to help with urinary issues, its effectiveness may vary from person to person, and it's always best to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.

remedies.remedy_desc: Equisetum arvense, also known as horsetail, is a plant that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including hematuria, or blood in the urine. The active compounds in the plant, such as silica and flavonoids, have anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the urinary tract. When used as a cream, these compounds can be easily absorbed through the skin and into the affected area, providing quick relief from pain and discomfort. The cream may help to reduce inflammation and promote the healing of damaged tissues in the urinary tract, which can help to prevent further bleeding and reduce the risk of complications. Additionally, the antiseptic properties of the plant may help to prevent infections and promote a healthy environment for healing.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal cream that helps with hematuria, also known as blood in the urine, you will need dried Plantago major leaves, a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil, beeswax, and a clean glass jar. First, you need to prepare the Plantago major leaves by infusing them in a carrier oil like coconut or olive oil. To do this, combine 1 cup of dried Plantago major leaves with 2 cups of carrier oil in a clean glass jar and let it sit in a cool, dark place for two weeks, shaking the jar every day. After two weeks, strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another clean glass jar, discarding the solids. Next, melt 1/2 cup of beeswax in a double boiler or in a microwave-safe bowl in 10-second increments, stirring between each interval until melted. Then, slowly pour the Plantago major infusion into the melted beeswax and stir until well combined. Pour the mixture into a clean glass jar and let it cool and harden. Once hardened, your Plantago major herbal cream is ready to use. Apply a small amount to the affected area 2-3 times a day to help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea purpurea cream is often used to help with hematuria, which is when blood is found in the urine. This condition can be painful and worrying. Echinacea purpurea cream may be helpful because it has anti-inflammatory properties. This means it can reduce swelling and ease pain in the urinary tract. The cream may also boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that can cause hematuria. Some people use it to soothe and calm the bladder and urinary tract, which can help to reduce bleeding and discomfort. Additionally, Echinacea purpurea cream may have antioxidant properties, which can help to protect the urinary tract from damage and promote healing. Some studies suggest that using Echinacea purpurea cream topically may be more effective than taking it orally, as it can directly target the affected area.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make a Plantago major herbal cream to help with hematuria, first, you'll need to dry and prepare the herb. Harvest Plantago major leaves and flowers when they are in full bloom, and dry them completely either by air-drying or using a food dehydrator. Once the herb is dry, grind it into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle. Next, mix the powdered herb with a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a ratio of 1 part Plantago major to 3 parts oil. Heat the mixture gently in a double boiler or a heat-proof bowl set over a pot of simmering water until the oil is warm and the herb is fully incorporated. Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool. Then, strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean container to remove any solids. Finally, add a thickening agent such as beeswax or candelilla wax to the oil and mix well. Pour the mixture into a small tin or jar and let it cool and solidify. Once set, the cream can be applied to the affected area to help soothe and calm the symptoms of hematuria.

remedies.remedy_desc: Hypericum perforatum cream is sometimes used for hematuria, which is bleeding from the urinary tract. Hematuria can be caused by irritation, infections, or stones in the urinary tract. The cream is made from the St. John's Wort plant, which has been used in traditional medicine for many years. It is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections in the urinary tract. When applied topically, the cream may help to soothe the affected area and promote healing. Some people believe that the cream can also help to reduce bleeding by improving blood clotting and preventing further irritation of the urinary tract. However, it's essential to note that the effectiveness of Hypericum perforatum cream for hematuria is still being researched, and more studies are needed to confirm its benefits.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal cream to help with hematuria, start by gathering the right herbs. First, dry the leaves of the Plantago major plant, either by air-drying or using a food dehydrator. Then, grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder. Next, mix the Plantago major powder with a carrier oil such as coconut oil or olive oil, in a ratio of about 1 part powder to 3 parts oil. Heat the mixture gently in a double boiler or a saucepan over low heat, until the powder is fully dissolved. Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool. Once cooled, strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove any remaining plant particles. Finally, transfer the cream to a clean container and store it in the refrigerator. To use, apply a small amount of the cream to the affected area and gently massage it in.

remedies.remedy_desc: Plantago major cream is a natural remedy that may help with hematuria, a condition where blood is present in the urine. This cream is made from the plant Plantago major, also known as broadleaf plantain, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The active ingredients in the cream have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce swelling and irritation in the urinary tract. This can lead to a decrease in bleeding and an improvement in symptoms. The cream may also help to soothe and calm the affected area, promoting healing and reducing discomfort. Some studies have suggested that the cream may be effective in reducing bleeding and improving symptoms in people with hematuria.
remedies.remedy_preparation: To make Plantago major herbal creams that help with hematuria, start by harvesting or purchasing dried Plantago major leaves. Then, steep 1 tablespoon of the dried leaves in 1 cup of boiling water for 5-7 minutes to make a herbal tea. Let the tea cool down, and then strain it to remove the leaves. Next, combine the cooled tea with 1/2 cup of coconut oil or any other carrier oil in a small saucepan. Heat the mixture gently over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the oil has infused with the tea's properties. Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it cool. Strain the mixture again to remove any remaining plant particles. Finally, add a few drops of vitamin E oil and any other desired essential oils to the cooled mixture. Pour the mixture into a clean glass jar and store it in the fridge to keep it fresh. Apply a small amount of the herbal cream to the affected area 2-3 times a day to help alleviate hematuria symptoms.  Note: Before using any herbal remedy, consult with a healthcare professional to ensure it's safe for your specific condition and health status.

intro_desc: Hematuria is when you see blood in your urine. This can be painful and uncomfortable. Using herbal creams can help. Urtica dioica, also known as nettle leaf, is good for this condition because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce swelling and pain in the urinary tract. This can help stop the bleeding and make you feel better.  Calendula officinalis, or marigold, is another herb that can help. It has antiseptic properties that can help prevent infection and promote healing. When applied as a cream, it can soothe the skin and reduce irritation in the urinary tract. This can help you feel more comfortable and improve your quality of life.  It's essential to address hematuria because it can be a sign of an underlying issue, such as a kidney stone or infection. If left untreated, these problems can worsen and cause more severe symptoms, including severe pain and even kidney damage. By using herbal creams and addressing the issue, you can reduce your risk of complications and feel better faster.
supplementary_best: To remedy hematuria, a combination of herbal creams made from Urtica dioica, Calendula officinalis, and Equisetum arvense can be effective. Urtica dioica, also known as nettle, has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling and pain in the urinary tract. Calendula officinalis, or marigold, has antimicrobial properties that can help prevent infections in the urinary tract, which can cause hematuria. Equisetum arvense, or horsetail, is a natural source of silica, which can help strengthen the tissues in the urinary tract and improve their function.  When used together in a cream, these herbs can help reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and improve the function of the urinary tract, all of which can help to remedy hematuria. The combination of Urtica dioica and Calendula officinalis can help to reduce pain and inflammation, while the addition of Equisetum arvense can help to improve the overall health of the urinary tract. This combination can be applied topically to the affected area to help soothe and heal the tissues in the urinary tract.  Note: Before using any herbal remedy, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional, especially if you have any underlying medical conditions or are taking medications.
supplementary_avoid: If you have hematuria, a condition where you have blood in your urine, it's best to avoid certain herbal creams. For example, avoid creams made with goldenseal (Hydrastis canadensis) because it contains a chemical called berberine, which can irritate the bladder and make hematuria worse. Also, avoid creams with saw palmetto (Serenoa repens) because it can slow down the flow of urine and make it harder for your body to remove the blood from your urine. Additionally, avoid creams with stinging nettle (Lapsana communis) as it may cause allergic reactions and increase blood flow to the affected area, making hematuria worse. Another herb to avoid is bladderwrack (Fucus vesiculosus), which can stimulate the bladder and cause more bleeding. Finally, avoid creams with dandelion root (Taraxacum officinale) because it can act as a diuretic, increasing urine production and possibly making it harder for your body to remove the blood from your urine.
supplementary_other_remedies: Hematuria, or blood in the urine, can be caused by various factors such as infections, stones, or kidney problems. Besides using herbal creams, there are other natural remedies that can help alleviate the symptoms. Cranberry juice and extracts are often recommended to prevent or treat urinary tract infections (UTIs), which can cause hematuria. This is because cranberry's proanthocyanidins may help prevent bacteria from adhering to the bladder and urinary tract walls, reducing the risk of infection. Additionally, apple cider vinegar can help balance the body's pH levels, which can help prevent kidney stones, a common cause of hematuria. Some people also find relief by drinking plenty of water to help flush out the urinary tract and reduce the concentration of bacteria and toxins. Furthermore, diuretic herbs like juniper berries and uva ursi can help increase urine production, reducing the risk of UTIs and promoting the removal of toxins from the body. These natural remedies can help alleviate the symptoms of hematuria, but it's essential to consult a doctor or healthcare professional before trying any new remedies, especially if the bleeding is heavy or persistent.
supplementary_related_ailments: People with hematuria, which is blood in the urine, may also experience other health problems. One common issue is kidney stones, which are hard deposits that can cause severe pain. Dandelion root can help break down these stones, making it easier to pass them. Its diuretic properties also increase urine production, which helps flush out the kidneys and reduce the risk of stones forming.  Another potential problem is urinary tract infections (UTIs), which can be caused by bacteria that enter the urinary system through the urethra. The herb uva ursi, also known as bearberry, has antiseptic properties that can help fight off these infections. Its astringent properties also help reduce inflammation and tighten the tissues in the urinary tract, making it harder for bacteria to take hold.  People with hematuria may also experience kidney inflammation, which can cause pain and discomfort. The herb juniper berries can help reduce inflammation and ease pain. Its diuretic properties also help increase urine production, which helps flush out the kidneys and reduce the risk of further inflammation.  Finally, some people with hematuria may experience anemia, which is a lack of red blood cells. The herb alfalfa has iron-rich properties that can help increase red blood cell production, making it easier to carry oxygen throughout the body. Its antioxidant properties also help protect the kidneys and other organs from damage caused by free radicals.
